Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}If you get attacked by the enemy, the battle will begin at a disadvantage to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Try and make certain that you strike the enemy first to guarantee the initiative in battles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you are able to strike the enemy before you are spotted, then you will gain the initiative.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}On the other hand, if the enemy hits you first, the opposite will occur.[n]{f 1 1}
